/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib CMakeFiles/test_set_commitment_gadget.dir/gadgetlib1/gadgets/set_commitment/tests/test_set_commitment_gadget.cpp.o -o test_set_commitment_gadget  libsnark.a ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmpxx.dylib -lcrypto
